name: 功的积分定义
subject: physics
domain_name: 力学-功能动量 Mechanics: Energy/Momentum
curriculum_points: 1.2.C.1.i Instantaneous velocity is the rate of change of the object’s position, which is equal to the derivative of position with respect to time. Relevant equations: v = dr/dt, v_x = dx/dt
1.2.C.1.ii Instantaneous acceleration is the rate of change of the object’s velocity, which is equal to the derivative of velocity with respect to time. Relevant equations: a = dv/dt, a_x = dv_x/dt
1.2.C.2 Time-dependent functions and instantaneous values of position, velocity, and acceleration can be determined using differentiation and integration.

1.3.A.4.i An object’s instantaneous velocity is the rate of change of the object’s position, which is equal to the slope of a line tangent to a point on a graph of the object’s position as a function of time. Relevant equation: v_x = dx/dt

1.3.A.4.ii An object’s instantaneous acceleration is the rate of change of the object’s velocity, which is equal to the slope of a line tangent to a point on a graph of the object’s velocity as a function of time. Relevant equation: a_x = dv_x/dt

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 定积分：调节积分上下限观察面积变化
GeoGebra 物理公式可视化：调节参数观察物理量关系

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「功的积分定义」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：1.2.C.1.i Instantaneous velocity is the rate of change of the object’s position, which is equal to the derivative of pos…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：1.2.C.1.ii Instantaneous acceleration is the rate of change of the object’s velo… 对理解「功的积分定义」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
